title: Woodland native Sagen Maddalena wins silver in women’s 50-meter rifle 3 positions shooting at Paris Olympics – Daily Democrat
description: Leone narrowly edged Sagen Maddalena of the United States by 1.4 points in the final. China’s Zhang Qiongyue was third for bronze in the event that involves shooting while kneeling, prone and standing. Maddalena is a Woodland native.
